mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resolutions (user_id, title, start_date, end_date, reminder_time, streak_group_id, streak_seq) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{reminderTime}, COALESCE(#{streakGroupId}::uuid, gen_random_uuid()), #{streakSeq}) RETURNING id

INSERT INTO resolution_checks (resolution_id, user_id, check_date, day_index, status) SELECT r.id, r.user_id, #{startDate}::date + g, (g + 1)::smallint, 'PENDING' FROM resolutions r CROSS JOIN generate_series(0, 2) AS g WHERE r.id = #{resolutionId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, start_date, end_date, status, reminder_time, streak_group_id::text AS streak_group_id, streak_seq FROM resolutions WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT check_date, day_index, status, completed_at FROM resolution_checks WHERE resolution_id = #{resolutionId} ORDER BY day_index ASC

SELECT c.check_date AS date, c.resolution_id AS resolution_id, r.title AS title, r.status AS resolution_status, c.status AS check_status FROM resolution_checks c JOIN resolutions r ON r.id = c.resolution_id AND r.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND to_char(c.check_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{yearMonth} ORDER BY c.check_date ASC, c.resolution_id ASC
SELECT check_date, day_index, status, completed_at FROM resolution_checks WHERE resolution_id = #{resolutionId} AND check_date = #{date}
SELECT count(*) FROM resolution_checks WHERE resolution_id = #{resolutionId} AND status = 'DONE'
mapper.update: UPDATE resolution_checks SET status = 'DONE', completed_at = now(), updated_at = now() WHERE resolution_id = #{resolutionId} AND check_date = #{today} AND status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE resolutions SET status = 'SUCCESS', updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'ONGOING' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM resolution_checks WHERE resolution_id = #{id} AND status <> 'DONE' )
UPDATE resolutions SET title = #{title}, reminder_time = #{reminderTime}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'ONGOING'
mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS check_id, c.resolution_id AS resolution_id, r.user_id AS user_id FROM resolution_checks c JOIN resolutions r ON r.id = c.resolution_id WHERE c.status = 'PENDING' AND c.check_date < #{today} AND r.status = 'ONGOING' AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.id LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE OF c SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update: UPDATE resolution_checks SET status = 'MISSED', updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{checkId} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE resolutions SET status = 'FAILED', updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{resolutionId} AND status = 'ONGOING'
mapper.select: WITH due AS ( SELECT c.id FROM resolution_checks c JOIN resolutions r ON r.id = c.resolution_id WHERE c.check_date = #{today} AND c.status = 'PENDING' AND r.status = 'ONGOING' AND r.deleted_at IS NULL AND (c.reminded_on IS DISTINCT FROM #{today}) AND r.reminder_time IS NOT NULL AND r.reminder_time <= #{now} ORDER BY c.id LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE OF c SKIP LOCKED ) UPDATE resolution_checks c SET reminded_on = #{today}, updated_at = now() FROM due, resolutions r WHERE c.id = due.id AND r.id = c.resolution_id RETURNING c.resolution_id AS resolution_id, r.user_id AS user_id, r.title AS title
